ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birth date of the employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the employee */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the employee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "disability_status" INTEGER /* Disability status of the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the employee belongs to */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title of the employee */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the employee is based */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee's contract was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "manager_id" TEXT /* ID of the manager of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's functions */,
  "head_of_department_id" TEXT /* ID of the head of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_head_of_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("head_of_department_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job position */,
  "salary_range" TEXT /* Salary range associated with the job title */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Headquarters) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is based */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given during the review */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided during the review */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Goals set for the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "training_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training in hours */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the training program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "employee_training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of training completion */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee who completed the training */,
  "training_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program completed */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the training was completed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the employee for the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_training_id FOREIGN KEY ("training_id") REFERENCES training_programs ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruitment" (
  "recruitment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruitment process */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job title being recruited for */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the position is based */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate applying for the position */,
  "candidate_email" TEXT /* Email of the candidate */,
  "resume" TEXT /* Resume of the candidate */,
  "cover_letter" TEXT /* Cover letter of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recruitment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruitment_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruitment_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee whose record was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee's record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_by" TEXT /* User ID of the person accessing the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_access_by FOREIGN KEY ("access_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, hr) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interviews" (
  "interview_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interview */,
  "recruitment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recruitment process */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the interview */,
  "interviewer_id" TEXT /* ID of the interviewer */,
  "candidate_id" TEXT /* ID of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interview_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_interviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("interviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_recruitment_id FOREIGN KEY ("recruitment_id") REFERENCES recruitment ("recruitment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interviews_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., ID, certificate) */,
  "document" TEXT /* Document itself */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_documents_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_leave" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave record */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., annual, sick) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "number_of_days" INTEGER /* Number of days taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_leave_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
